repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
paracontent_tesim: I, Yūḥannā the bishop of Mount Sinai, state that this horologion / is endowed to the church for the monks to be comforted by it. Whoever went out taking it is banned
اقول انا يوحنا اسقف طور سينا ان هذه السواعي / وقف على الكنيسه يتعز فيها الرهبان فمن خرج بهواه و / صحبه؟ يكون محروم
full_text_tesim: I, Yūḥannā the bishop of Mount Sinai, state that this horologion / is endowed to the church for the monks to be comforted by it. Whoever went out taking it is banned
